sanskrit:
ततः पदं तत्परिमार्गितव्यं यस्मिन्गता न निवर्तन्ति भूयः।
तमेव चाद्यं पुरुषं प्रपद्ये यतः प्रवृत्तिः प्रसृता पुराणी॥
transliteration:
tataḥ padaṃ tat parimārgitavyaṃ yasmin gatā na nivartanti bhūyaḥ |
tam eva cādyaṃ puruṣaṃ prapadye yataḥ pravṛttiḥ prasṛtā purāṇī ||
literal_meaning: Then that place must be sought, having gone where they do not return again; to that primordial Person I take refuge, from whom the ancient flow has spread forth.
contextual_meaning: After severing attachment to the illusory tree of life, one is invited to discover the inner refuge that ends compulsive rebirth; surrender to the source-self dissolves the cycle of psychological re-creation.
psychological_state: Post-detachment orientation; the mind, freed from object-clinging, now seeks an irreversible existential homeostasis with its own source.
trigger_scenario: The moment after deleting social-media accounts and realizing the mind still craves a deeper 'place' to rest; the search for a ground that never ghosts you back.
anchor_text: Turn within to the changeless source and never return to the wheel of restless becoming.
